name: Aisha
text: Moon. Mira said you would keep moving after the table turned against you.

name: Moon
text: Then you know why I cannot stop.

name: Aisha
text: Desire can point like a blade. It cuts whoever mistakes wanting for truth.

name: Aisha
text: Order binds the outcome. Chaos abandons it. Show me the path between them.

name: Moon
text: Draw the Blade of Desires. I will.
